final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce promotional poster for "绿联私有云" brand's "618" anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical poster layout with hero visual at top and promotional text hierarchy below
Subject: must include the "绿联私有云" brand and the "618" anniversary sale as the focal theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory sale event atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, festive e-commerce direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, primary), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: must preserve brand name and sale event identity as dominant visual anchors
Avoid:
